word: G3039 - λικμάω - likmáō - lik-mah'-o - Grind to powder

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Grind to powder
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
3. to crush to pieces, grind to powder
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From λικμός likmos, the equivalent. of λίκνον liknon (a winnowing fan or basket); to winnow, that is, (by analogy) to triturate: - grind to powder.
